subject: Audino, a plump pink bipedal Pokemon with large curled ears and a soft round body, resting in dried golden grass
description: Audino sits low and relaxed in a bed of dry golden-brown grass, its round pink body filling most of the frame. The creature's most striking features are its large, fluffy, cream-colored curled ears that frame its head on both sides. Its expression is gentle and contented. The background is warm amber and straw-colored dried grassland, suggesting late season or a meadow at rest. The overall composition is cozy and grounded, the creature nestled into its environment.
background: Dried golden-brown grass filling the frame
emotion: calm and content; resting posture, soft expression
